description.value:
Frequency once per day

Effect You temporarily merge yourself with an adjacent willing creature you can speak to with your limited telepathy, overlaying yourself atop them for 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this effect. When you do, you emerge in a space adjacent to the target you merged with. While combined, you and your target each take your own turns as normal and must be targeted separately for the purposes of abilities and other effects.

You occupy the target's space and can't take actions with the move trait. If the target moves, you move with them. For each Speed you possess, compare it to that of your target. If your Speed is faster, or they lack that Speed, they gain your Speed. The target gains any entu ancestry feats you have while you're merged, except those that require being a hostless entu.
